title: BudgetActualInputRecord
description: Input row for budget vs actual CSV data used by the Budget Variance Agent. CSV numeric cells may be provided as strings and are parsed by the loader.

period.description: Accounting or management reporting period, such as 2026-03.

account.description: Finance account or budget item name.

budget_amount.description: Budget amount for the period. Parsed as float by the CSV loader.

actual_amount.description: Actual amount for the period. Parsed as float by the CSV loader.

variance_amount.description: Actual amount minus budget amount. Parsed as float when present; the CSV loader can calculate this when the CSV cell is blank.

variance_rate.description: Variance amount divided by budget amount. Accepts decimal strings such as 0.125, percentage strings such as 12.5%, or blank cells that the CSV loader can calculate.

business_driver.description: Primary business driver behind the variance.

remark.description: Additional finance or business context for the record.
